title: BIDS Term-Mapping document
description: Validates a BEP-043-style BIDS Term Mapping document: a set of rules that project relative file paths onto BIDS concepts (entities, datatype, suffix, metadata). Path templates are PCRE (Perl-compatible regular expressions) with named capture groups, one of the two syntaxes BEP-043 floats. A strict BEP-043 core is required; implementation extensions are permitted only under `^x_`-prefixed keys.

Template.description: A PCRE matched against a dataset-relative POSIX path. Named capture groups `(?P<name>...)` bind BIDS entities (e.g. `subject`, `session`, `hemi`).

Entities.description: BIDS entity -> literal value (constant entities not captured by the template).
